#ASGARDEX v1.43.2 🚀 

Migrate NineRealms endpoints to Liquify & update xchainjs packages.


## What's Changed
* chore: update xchainjs packages to latest releases by @Naq302 in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/1035
* fix: migrate NineRealms endpoints to Liquify by @Thorian1te in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/1038


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/compare/v1.43.1...v1.43.2

# ASGARDEX v1.43.1 🚀 
Various Vultisig fixes for smoother UI experience

## What's Changed
* fix: Various Vultisig fixes by @Naq302 in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/1030
* chore: bump version to 1.43.1 and update changelog by @Thorian1te in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/1032


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/compare/v1.43.0...v1.43.1

# ASGARDEX v1.43.0 🚀 

Vultisig MPC wallet integration, interactive price charts, compact trading panel with inline swap quotes, THORChain rapid swap mode, and 5 new Vultisig-supported chains. Under
  the hood: EVM service refactors, memory leak fixes, lazy LP share fetching, unified TxModal, and updated xchain packages.


## What's Changed
* chore: clean up release pipeline workflows by @Thorian1te in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/1005
* refactor: fix memory leaks and remove dead code by @Thorian1te in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/1006
* Refactor/evm chain service factory by @Thorian1te in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/1007
* fix: patch memory leaks, error handling, and remove dead code by @underthesun49 in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/1008
* Refactor/evm ledger transaction factory by @Thorian1te in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/1009
* fix: replace deprecated MayaScan with explorer.mayachain.info and fix… by @underthesun49 in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/1011
* Feat/charting by @Thorian1te in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/1013
* feat: Vultisig MPC wallet integration by @Naq302 in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/1012
* fix: correct XRD LP share value and clean up sidebar footer by @underthesun49 in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/1014
* Feat/chart wallet integration by @Thorian1te in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/1015
* Chore/xchain updates by @underthesun49 in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/1017
* Fix/price level amount symbol by @Thorian1te in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/1020
* Implement save JSON balances feature by @erikd in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/1019
* refactor: extract reusable hooks and components from Swap.tsx by @Thorian1te in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/1023
* refactor: unified TxModal with SOL fee reserve fix by @underthesun49 in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/1024
* feat: compact trading panel with inline swap quote modal by @underthesun49 in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/1021
* fix: migrate TradingPanel to new SwapTxModal props by @underthesun49 in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/1025
* Feat/wire 5 chains vultisig by @Naq302 in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/1016
* Fix/sdk disposal error recovery by @Naq302 in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/1022
* Chore/update xchain packages by @Thorian1te in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/1026
* feat: add THORChain rapid swap mode and lazy LP share fetching by @Thorian1te in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/1027
* fix: default to Streaming mode, fix snap-back bug, add AVAX.SOL decimals by @Thorian1te in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/1029

## New Contributors
* @erikd made their first contribution in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/1019

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/compare/v1.42.1...v1.43.0

# ASGARDEX v1.42.1 🚀 
Added coin control for utxo chains in the send form for keystore & ledger. Fixed Solana swapping issues for protocol Thorchain. Many other performance improvements & features. Vultisig soon 😎 


## What's Changed
* needed for GH actions by @Thorian1te in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/973
* update xchain-zcash to 1.1.0 for NU6.1 consensus support by @Thorian1te in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/975
* fix: MAYA.MAYA support for swaps, LP deposits, and pricing by @Thorian1te in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/976
* upgrade Tailwind CSS from v3 to v4 by @Thorian1te in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/977
* perf: React rendering optimizations by @underthesun49 in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/978
* perf: optimize combineShares and pool detail lookups from O(n²) to O(n) by @underthesun49 in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/980
* perf: RxJS memory and retry optimizations by @underthesun49 in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/981
* perf: limit concurrent balance requests with batched reloading by @underthesun49 in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/979
* fix: resolve Tailwind v4 styling issues across codebase by @underthesun49 in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/982
* Feat/utxo integration by @underthesun49 in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/983
* fix: resolve bugs across major component files by @underthesun49 in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/984
* chore: remove unused deps, upgrade theme package, replace hardcoded c… by @Thorian1te in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/985
* feat: add THORName/MAYAName reverse lookup and modernize interact forms by @underthesun49 in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/986
* Chore/upgrade xchain packages by @underthesun49 in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/988
* fix: correct THORName/MAYAName extraction bugs and i18n audit by @underthesun49 in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/989
* feat: add coin control for UTXO chains by @Thorian1te in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/990
* fix: enable SOL swaps on THORChain by @underthesun49 in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/991
* chore: remove dead CRA artifacts, unused deps, and replace framer-mot… by @Thorian1te in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/992
* fix: trade swap stale fee asset and unlock password error by @Thorian1te in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/994
* fix: thread coin control through Ledger IPC pipeline by @underthesun49 in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/993
* fixed loading from pools page bug by @Thorian1te in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/995
* chore: prepare release v1.42.1 by @Thorian1te in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/997
* [Fix]: ERC20 Approval, Font weights, and Tx UI by @Naq302 in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/998
* refactor: replace echarts with pure SVG donut chart by @Thorian1te in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/1003
* chore: remove dead code and unused exports by @Thorian1te in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/1001
* Add structured dev-only renderer logging by @Naq302 in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/1002
* refactor: extract useERC20Approval hook from duplicated approval logic by @underthesun49 in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/1004


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/compare/v1.42.0...v1.42.1

# ASGARDEX v1.42.0 🚀 The latest Asgardex Desktop update introduces configurable EVM features in Expert Mode—including a gas multiplier setting, per-network RPC endpoint editing with validation and health checks, fixing Chainflip service error blocking. ## What's Changed * Centralize EnhancedClient logic by @Naq302 in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/965 * Feat/add editable evm rpc providers by @Thorian1te in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/966 * Refactor/unified balance pattern: centralize wallet type logic for trigger selection by @Naq302 in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/967 * Feat/update ledger evm rpc by @Thorian1te in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/968 * fix blocking chainflip error by @Thorian1te in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/971 * add gas multiplier for evm chains by @Thorian1te in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/969 * update for release by @Thorian1te in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/972 **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/compare/v1.41.5... ## The following binaries have been signed by THORChain/ASGARDEX admins listed at [admin-gpg](https://github.com/thorchain/Resources/blob/master/admin-GPG-keys.md) fca4a71d2b31e25d5a04c5f4e9f88a625c51ba9cd1e8aa00433cf53fe0b7118f ASGARDEX-1.42.0-linux.AppImage 68663eadc012057e8b91df0c77d256bceab5ce7f6ead9520a1b2de18cf5cc2c0 ASGARDEX-1.42.0-linux.deb 16323c54381de665df94829535889ae9990d65905b8efed496827b7550b878c2 ASGARDEX-1.42.0-mac-14-Sonoma.dmg 550df19f9049f2241101892f2dcd061266496f2b06edd4d9f3cab867cebee917 ASGARDEX-1.42.0-mac-15-Sequoia.dmg 93c33166170432cad91f635043ebae04ed12e01461beb43b779449cc41d08e99 ASGARDEX-1.42.0-win.exe

# ASGARDEX v1.41.5

Added Trade Deposit from L1 chains. Test with small amounts first. Trade asset swaps are fee-less now for both Mayachain & Thorchain. Many small fixes and UI improvements.  

## What's Changed
* feat: tx slideshow by @cinnamoroll6130 in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/941
* add LUSD to default assets and fix const errors by @Thorian1te in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/943
* fix ledger only mode issues by @Thorian1te in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/942
* chore: hide synth from asset select by @cinnamoroll6130 in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/945
* update xchainjs package & fix arbitrum fee issue by @Thorian1te in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/946
* resolve chainflip channel ID tracking issue by @Thorian1te in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/947
* feat: swap view optimization by @cinnamoroll6130 in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/948
* chore: cleanup unused modules by @cinnamoroll6130 in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/950
* update url for Thorchain node addreses by @Thorian1te in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/951
* removes affiliate fees from tradeswaps for Thorchain & mayachain by @Thorian1te in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/952
* Trade deposit by @Thorian1te in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/955
* fixed unstake, slider & added more info by @Thorian1te in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/957
* chore: enhance bonds view by @cinnamoroll6130 in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/958
* prepare for new release by @Thorian1te in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/959

ASGARDEX v1.41.4 🚀 

Recent Asgardex Desktop updates added custom ERC20 support, Chainflip boost, CACAO pool UI, synth mint warnings (Mayachain deprecating synths so redeem immediately), improved token imports, fixed i18n and minor visuals.

## What's Changed
* add custom erc20 support by @Thorian1te in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/927
* chore: add warning for synth mint by @cinnamoroll6130 in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/929
* chore: update import tokens ui by @cinnamoroll6130 in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/932
* chore: add cacao pool ui by @cinnamoroll6130 in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/931
* chore: fix missing i18ns by @cinnamoroll6130 in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/935
* chore: hide the chain icon for open state of collapse by @cinnamoroll6130 in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/936
* udpate aggregator package & add boost option for chainflip by @Thorian1te in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/937
* update & add changelog by @Thorian1te in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/938


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/compare/v1.41.3...v1.41.4

#ASGARDEX v1.41.3 🚀 

We had to cut this emergency release due to Ankr RPC provider no longer being a viable option. It was causing connection issues and degraded performance for BSC (Binance Smart Chain) and AVAX (Avalanche) networks.
   
## What's Changed
* Update to default gas prices, loading smoothed out for trade assets by @Thorian1te in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/924
* switching rpc providers for BSC & AVAX by @Thorian1te in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/925
* Ready for new release by @Thorian1te in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/926


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/compare/v1.41.2...v1.41.3

# ASGARDEX v1.41.2 🚀 
🚀 Features

  Solana Ledger Support

  - Added full Ledger hardware wallet integration for Solana (#920)
    - Address derivation and transaction signing via Ledger
    - Updated wallet selection views with Solana Ledger option

  Component Architecture Improvements

  - Removed styled-components from codebase (#915)
    - Refactored components to use modern styling approach
    - Updated asset-related components, forms, and views

  Developer Experience

  - Added Prettier Tailwind CSS plugin (#921)
  - Updated core dependencies and packages

  🐛 Bug Fixes

  - ChainFlip: Fixed fee calculation issues (#922)
  - TRON USDT: Resolved send form bugs and updated quotes to use liquidity-based calculations (#918)
  - Fees: Fixed fee calculation and added send state management (#909)
  - Asset Switching: Improved asset switch logic (#919)


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/compare/v1.41.1...v1.41.2

#ASGARDEX v1.41.1 🚀 
* Chainflip tracking added 
* Mayachain ledger added. Use the Thorchain ledger (device) app
* Tron ledger added
* Xrp ledger added 

## What's Changed
* add chainflip tracking components and logic by @Thorian1te in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/907
* Chore/chainflip updates by @Thorian1te in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/908
* fix fee issue & add send state to send.shared by @Thorian1te in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/909
* added ledger mayachain & removed old .d.ts files by @Thorian1te in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/910
* update build params by @Thorian1te in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/911
* Chore/handle-swap errors & smooth input experience by @Thorian1te in https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/pull/913


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/asgardex/asgardex-desktop/compare/v1.41.0...v1.41.1
